
%% ______           _ _                     
%% | ___ \         | (_)                    
%% | |_/ /_   _  __| |_ ___ _ __ ___   ___  
%% | ___ \ | | |/ _` | / __| '_ ` _ \ / _ \ 
%% | |_/ / |_| | (_| | \__ \ | | | | | (_) |
%% \____/ \__,_|\__,_|_|___/_| |_| |_|\___/ 
                                         
                                         

= Buddhism Index =
    * Renacimento X reencarnacao
    * Bandeira budista 
    * Samsara 
    * 4 selos do Dharma
    * Dharmachakra
    * Tathāgata 
= Megas Referencias =
    * https://dsbcproject.org - canone em sanskrito
    * http://www.cbeta.org/ -canone em chines classico 
    * https://archive.org/details/I.B.Horner-Vinaya-Pitaka - Vynaya-Pytaka em ingles por cambridge
== Online text ==
    * https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Roman_von_Ungern-Sternberg#In_popular_culture - Roman Von Ungern Stenberg figura do budismo
    * https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Plotinus  - Plotinus
    * https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Ammonius_Saccas - Amonius Saccas
    * https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Tus_have_I_heard - Thus have i heard
    * https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Yin_Shun - Yin Shun
    * http://www.cbeta.org/donation/index.php#use - CEBETA(canone Budista)
    * https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Buddhism_and_violence - BUdismo e violencia 
    * https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Vimalakirti_Sutra - Sutra de Vimalakirti
    * http://www.chinabuddhismencyclopedia.com/en/index.php/Anuttara-samyak-sambodhi - Samiak sambodhi
    * https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Exegesis - Exegesis
    * https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Max_M%C3%BCller - Max Muller
    * https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Nagarjuna - Nagarjuna
    * https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Tiantai#Teachings - Ensinamentos Tiantai
    * https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Buddha-nature - Natureza Buda
    * https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Mah%C4%81y%C4%81na_Mah%C4%81parinirv%C4%81%E1%B9%87a_S%C5%ABtra - sutra do nirvana
    * https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Buddhist_ethics#Killing - Etica no Budismo
    * https://studybuddhism.com/pt/estudos-avancados/lam-rim/os-cinco-agregados/os-quatro-selos-do-dharma - Os 4 selos do Dharma 
    * https://tricycle.org/magazine/tibetan-vegetarians/ - vegetarianismo no tibet 
    * http://www.shabkar.org/about/thesite/index.htm - Vegetarianismo e Shakbar tibet
    * https://lapislazulitexts.com/ - Textos e outras tralhas 
    * https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Barlaam_and_Josaphat - texto sobre santo na igreja que seria buda 
    * https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Navayana - movimento Navayana na india, uma formulacao social mais marxista do budismo
